scenario: ALTER TABLE customers DROP COLUMN legacy_segment — §1.4 commercial nucleus hero scenario

changes.summary: column legacy_segment removed from table customers

nodes.reason: View SELECT-references customers.legacy_segment directly; column no longer exists after DROP COLUMN

Package body references customers.legacy_segment in get_customers_by_segment (WHERE clause + SELECT list), get_segment_summary (GROUP BY), and audit_segment_access (%TYPE anchor + SELECT). All three become invalid.
Procedure references customers.legacy_segment via %TYPE anchor and a SELECT in the FOR loop cursor.

objects_not_broken: pkg_customer_report PACKAGE SPEC (spec does not reference legacy_segment; spec status remains VALID)

audit_trail.oracle_ground_truth: ALL_OBJECTS.STATUS=INVALID confirmed on all three dependents via live Oracle XE 23ai
